title: OASIS HOUSE - 211info
text: OASIS HOUSE OASIS HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a daytime drop-in center. Services include hygiene, meals (to-go options available), pet care (including dog and cat food, flea and tick medicine, and toys), a clothing closest (each person is allowed 25 items and one coat), and bike repair. Services are not guaranteed and depend on available donations. 802 SW 5th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Bike repair: Must be an individual experiencing homelessness and the bike their only means of transportation All other services: Unrestricted Hours: -Hygiene: Monday 9am-4pm -Dinner: Tuesday 4:30pm-6pm -Pet care: Wednesday 9am-4pm -Clothing: Thursday 9am-4pm -Bike repair: Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 709-6792 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 709-6792 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Drop In Centers * Homelessness Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
